integrations.dataNotice: All integrations process personal health data in compliance with KVKK (Law No. 6698) and GDPR regulations. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). API credentials are stored securely and never exposed in logs.
integrations.credentialsNotice: Credentials are encrypted and stored securely. Changes require admin authorization.

home.heroSubtitle: One-click, end-to-end care: discovery, availability, telehealth, health tourism and secure communication.
home.coreBox1Desc: Professional Reviews provide expert opinions on clinics/hospitals and their facilities with photos, videos, and materials to help you make the best decision about your treatment.
home.coreBox2Desc: With Medstream, follow your favorite clinics, receive their latest updates, and engage with posts. Get personalized updates from clinics in your preferred region and specialization.
home.coreBox3Desc: World-first artificial intelligence that provides symptom analysis and processes treatment requests, matching you with qualified doctors in your chosen location for your medical needs.
home.coreBox4Desc: Arrange your complete medical journey with one click - flights, accommodation, transport, and treatment - with transparent total pricing.
home.coreBox5Title: Telehealth and Messaging with Real-Time Translation
home.coreBox5Desc: Communicate with your doctor or patients instantly online in your native language. No more language barriers through real-time translation technology.
home.coreBox6Desc: Complete clinic/hospital management system with specialized access levels for different staff roles, seamlessly integrating your medical tourism and regular operations.

about.title: About MedaGama
about.subtitle: Transforming healthcare access worldwide through technology and innovation.
about.missionDesc: To make quality healthcare accessible to everyone, everywhere, by connecting patients with the best medical professionals and facilities worldwide.
about.visionDesc: A world where geographical boundaries don't limit access to quality healthcare.
